revision.content: [[Image:PrintrBot.jpg|200px|thumb|PrintrBot its cabinet]] Bloominglabs has a PrintrBot Simple v1 (1310) [[3D Printers|3D printer]], controlled with a [[Sunverge | donated ag150]]. == Official Documentation == PrintrBot model 1310 is pretty old, and the information on it is not easily available on printrbot.com. All of the official documentation on the "legacy" printrbots can be found in [https://drive.google.com/open?id=0B9oj0J-4qhdjWThtZmY2YzJIRE0 this google drive folder]. The (copyrighted) assembly manual can be found [https://drive.google.com/open?id=0B9oj0J-4qhdjVXZhU3l6Um5LVTg here]. == Using Locally == Login to the ag150 with username "blabs". [https://ultimaker.com/en/products/cura-software Cura] software GPL AFFERO V1 == Using via Command Line == Login remotely with secure shell: "ssh -XC blabs@192.168.1.137". The Arduino terminal can be used to directly talk to the PrintrBot. Serial is set up to be 115200 baud. === Useful [http://reprap.org/wiki/G-code g-codes] === * M115 reports Firmware installed. FIRMWARE_NAME: Marlin v1; Sprinter/grbl mashup for gen6 FIRMWARE_URL:http://www.mendel-parts.com PROTOCOL_VERSION:1.0 MACHINE_TYPE Mendel EXTRUDER_COUNT:3 * M114 reports position. * M119 reports endpoint status. [[Category:Tools]] [[Category:3D Printers]]
